headers.access-control-allow-headers: Authorization, X-Requested-With, Origin, ODS-API-Analytics-App, ODS-API-Analytics-Embed-Type, ODS-API-Analytics-Embed-Referrer, ODS-Widgets-Version, Accept
headers.access-control-expose-headers: ODS-Explore-API-Deprecation, Link, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Reset, X-RateLimit-dataset-Remaining, X-RateLimit-dataset-Limit, X-RateLimit-dataset-Reset
